name: sap-mcp-server
description: Independent open-source MCP server for SAP (ABAP / BTP) via a backend relay

scripts.build:bin:linux: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:blob && cp $(command -v node) build/sap-mcp-server-linux && npx postject build/sap-mcp-server-linux NODE_SEA_BLOB build/sea.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2 && chmod +x build/sap-mcp-server-linux
scripts.build:bin:win: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:blob && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync(process.execPath,'build/sap-mcp-server-win.exe')" && npx postject build/sap-mcp-server-win.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB build/sea.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
